text.title: Contract-First Development Workflow
text.summary: Design → lint → codegen → implement → validate lifecycle with mandatory gates at each stage.

rule.statement: Write the OpenAPI spec before any server code; no implementation file is created until the spec passes spectral lint and human review.
rule.rationale: Code-first leads to inconsistent APIs and integration delays. A committed spec lets FE start against a Prism mock immediately and gives the LLM a constraint it cannot drift from.

rule.statement: Define all request/response schemas using $ref to shared components; never inline schema definitions in path operations.
rule.rationale: Inlined schemas duplicate across endpoints, diverge over time, and break codegen that expects named schemas.

example.code: openapi: 3.1.0 paths: /payments: post: operationId: createPayment requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreatePaymentRequest' responses: '201': content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Payment' '400': $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'

rule.statement: Run openapi-generator after every spec change; never hand-edit generated stubs — mark them read-only via .openapi-generator-ignore for service classes.
rule.rationale: Hand-editing generated code causes spec-vs-implementation drift; the next regen overwrites changes silently.

example.code:
# Generate Python FastAPI server stubs openapi-generator generate \ -i openapi.yaml \ -g python-fastapi \ -o ./generated \ --additional-properties=packageName=payment_api
# Generate TypeScript client openapi-generator generate \ -i openapi.yaml \ -g typescript-axios \ -o ./client

section.title: Validation Gate

rule.statement: Run schemathesis or openapi-core response validation in CI to verify that every real response shape matches the spec, not just that the spec is syntactically valid.
rule.rationale: Spec linters verify structure; they cannot detect semantic errors (correct shape, wrong status code, wrong pagination semantics).

section.reference: CI script: lint + codegen + diff + oasdiff breaking check
Minimal OpenAPI 3.1 scaffold with reusable components
